zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Audley於1540年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden52歲，母親Elizabeth Grey25歲。她於1557年3月2日與Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年1月10日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年24歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Audley于1540年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden52岁，母亲Elizabeth Grey25岁。她于1557年3月2日与Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk在英国英格兰艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年1月10日在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年24岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Audley was born in 1540, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden, was 52 and her mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 25. She married Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk on 2 March 1557, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 January 1564, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 24, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Audley est née en 1540, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grey, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk le 2 mars 1557, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1564, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Audley 1540 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden 52 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Grey 25. Sie hat am 2. März 1557 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1564 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Audley è nata il nel 1540 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Grey, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk il 2 marzo 1557, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1564, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Audleyが1540年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Waldenは52歳，母Elizabeth Greyは25歳であった。1557年3月2日にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでThomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年1月10日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで24歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.Christchurch, London, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 그린위치 크리스트 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Audley(이)가 1540년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1557년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 1월 10일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Audley nasceu em 1540, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grey, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk em 2 de março de 1557, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1564, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 24 anos, e foi sepultada em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Christchurch, London, Middlesex, England: краист чурч, гринвич, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Audley родилась в 1540 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk 2 марта 1557 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 января 1564 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk el 2 de marzo de 1557, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1564, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultada en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
